heading: Coastal Engineering Research Center; establishment; powers and functions
label: 426–1 Coastal Engineering Research Center; establishment; powers and functions
text: There shall be established under the Chief of Engineers, United States Army, a Coastal Engineering Research Center which, except as hereinafter provided in , shall be vested with all the functions of the Beach Erosion Board, including the authority to make general investigations as provided in , and such additional functions as the Chief of Engineers may assign.section 426–3 of this titlesection 426a of this title
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of . The remainder of said section 1, abolishing the Beach Erosion Board, is classified as a note under .section 1 of Pub. L. 88–172section 426 of this title

Abolition of Beach Erosion Boardabolished Beach Erosion Board, and is set out as a note under . For the transfer of certain functions of said Board to Board of Engineers for Rivers and Harbors, see . For termination of Board of Engineers for Rivers and Harbors 180 days after , and reassignment of duties and responsibilities by Secretary of Army, see , set out as a note under .Section 1 of Pub.
